evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Balanced signal between velocity ('fast-moving product company') and rigour ('data trustworthiness'), placing it in mixed.
evidence.domain_risk: customer-facing dashboards and increasingly AI features
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Focus on customer-facing products without explicit financial/regulatory language indicates moderate risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: building or significantly improving a data warehouse, BI setup
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Evidence of infrastructure work ('building or significantly improving') suggests growing mid-stage function.
evidence.jd_authorship: balancing competing priorities in a fast-moving product company; building a data layer that serves internal decisions, customer-facing dashboards, and increasingly AI features
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific architectural challenges and stakeholder framing demonstrates hiring manager ownership over boilerplate.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: customer-facing dashboards and increasingly AI features
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Product and growth focus emphasized through customer-facing outputs and AI feature integration.
evidence.autonomy_level: building a data layer; you will define
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Architectural ownership ('build a data layer') indicates strategic autonomy over execution.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Explicit mention of building data infrastructure for downstream AI systems places this as ai_enabler.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or quality framework signals.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of testing, data contracts, or quality ownership frameworks.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Data trustworthiness emphasizes reliability as a concern but not framed as risk-control measure.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of buildout ('building') and optimization ('significantly improving').
